task_description: Implement foundational infrastructure for the Sleep Audio Pipeline: S3 Input Bucket (encrypted, versioned, EventBridge-enabled), S3 Output Bucket (encrypted, versioned), and EventBridge Rule triggered on Object Created events from the Input Bucket. Follow strict TDD with tests first.

verification.summary: All 5 tests pass. cdk synth succeeds. v2 semantic review APPROVED. LogGroup has explicit 7-day retention and DESTROY policy. Tests verify bucket security properties, EventBridge notification enablement, rule event pattern with bucket-name filter, and SSL enforcement via bucket policies.
